# v2.2.0

## Changed

- Updated for **Minecraft 26.2-rc-2** (Fabric).
- Internal: the afterimage system (manager + renderer) moved into a shared `common/` module so the
  Fabric and (future) NeoForge builds compile the exact same code — no behavior change.
- Mod Menu integration updated to its 26.2 build (`20.0.0-beta.2`); the previous 26.1 build crashed on 26.2.

## Fixed

- 26.2 render pipeline: afterimage trails now submit through the new `SubmitNodeCollector`
  (`submitCustomGeometry`) in place of the removed `LevelRenderContext.bufferSource()`.
- Further 26.2 API updates: `GameRenderer.mainCamera()` and `Minecraft.gui.screen()`.
- The mod now loads correctly on 26.2-rc.2 (the Fabric dependency uses Minecraft's normalized in-game version id).

## Notes

- **Fabric only, for now.** NeoForge has not published a 26.2 build yet — the NeoForge release will follow once it does.
- Built and pinned specifically against `26.2-rc-2`. A later release candidate or the final 26.2 release may need a separate build, so treat this as a testing build.
